description_long: This object is a small bird with a streamlined body and a relatively long, straight tail. Its plumage is predominantly dark brown to black, with subtle lighter markings along the wings and underbelly. The bird has a short, slightly curved beak and small, rounded head, with a smooth transition from the head to the body. Its legs are short and dark, barely visible beneath the body. The wings are folded tightly against the sides, and the tail feathers are narrow and extend straight back. The overall appearance suggests a bird adapted for perching and agile flight, commonly seen in urban parks and gardens.
description: A small, dark bird with a streamlined body, long straight tail, and subtle lighter markings on its wings and underbelly.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, long tail, and subtle lighter markings on the wings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the narrow, straight tail and the symmetry of the folded wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the bird's profile and beak shape.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, short beak, and the bird's compact body shape.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mostly solid dark with faint lighter markings on wings and underbelly
